calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment Awarding Damages Following Default
Off Calendar Nov-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for motion for Judgment awarding damages following default hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Plaintiff and cross-defendant, Michael C. Pantazis, appearing in pro per with witness, Burton H. Wolf, was sworn & examined. Defendant Carmine Charles Pascucci did not appear. Defendant Andrew E. Turnauer has previously received a court trial judgment in his favor.
Plaintiff Pantazis requests $25,000.00 in damages against defaulted defendant Pascucci after court trial. Documents submitted in court for review returned to plaintiff.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court takes the matter under submission. Plaintiff is instructed to prepare proposed judgment.
